problem id: 1f7407ed
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11010110 -> 10001011
  10101000 -> 10111010
  01010011 -> 00000101
  00110101 -> 11110110
  11101000 -> 10111011
  00010101 -> 11110111
  11111101 -> 10110011
  01110000 -> 01111101
  00000001 -> 11010111

query: 01110010
predicted answer: 00101101
